calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Oct-17-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER IMARI RUTHERFORD'S Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandate.

Pro per petitioner's "petition for writ of mandate" is denied without prejudice to filing and service of an understandable petition.

Moving party to prepare a proposed form of order.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JPT)
